full.file_describe:
Bug Fixes
1. Fixed an issue where filament mapping failed on the Print Preprocessing page when Generic Support for PLA was selected.
2. Fixed an issue where slicing painted models with dome-shaped structures could result in maze-like patterns, island artifacts, or partial geometry loss.
3. Re-enabled infill parameter settings under Process > Multimaterial > Filament for Features.
4. Fixed an issue with the Fuzzy Skin painting feature where certain painted areas failed to generate Fuzzy Skin while unpainted areas incorrectly generated it.
5. Fixed an issue where sparse infill patterns were misaligned on the first layer.
